name: sheetforge-mcp
description: SheetForge MCP for reading, writing, and reshaping Excel workbooks

tools.name: create_workbook
tools.description: Create a new Excel workbook

tools.name: create_worksheet
tools.description: Create a new worksheet in a workbook

tools.name: get_workbook_metadata
tools.description: Get workbook metadata and structure

tools.name: list_named_ranges
tools.description: List workbook defined names and destinations

tools.name: list_all_sheets
tools.description: List all sheets with row and column counts

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List native Excel tables in a workbook or worksheet

tools.name: read_excel_table
tools.description: Read rows from a native Excel table by table name

tools.name: quick_read
tools.description: Read a compact table from an explicit sheet or the first workbook sheet

tools.name: write_data_to_excel
tools.description: Write data to Excel cells

tools.name: read_data_from_excel
tools.description: Read data from Excel range

tools.name: read_excel_as_table
tools.description: Read worksheet data as compact headers and rows

tools.name: search_in_sheet
tools.description: Search worksheet cells for matching values

tools.name: append_table_rows
tools.description: Append table rows using worksheet headers

tools.name: update_rows_by_key
tools.description: Update table rows by matching a key column

tools.name: format_range
tools.description: Apply formatting to a cell range

tools.name: format_ranges
tools.description: Apply formatting to multiple ranges in one call

tools.name: freeze_panes
tools.description: Set or clear worksheet freeze panes

tools.name: set_autofilter
tools.description: Apply an autofilter to a worksheet range

tools.name: set_worksheet_visibility
tools.description: Set worksheet visibility to visible, hidden, or veryHidden

tools.name: get_worksheet_protection
tools.description: Get worksheet protection state and option flags

tools.name: set_worksheet_protection
tools.description: Enable or disable worksheet protection with optional capability flags

tools.name: set_print_area
tools.description: Set or clear worksheet print area

tools.name: set_print_titles
tools.description: Set or clear repeating print title rows and columns

tools.name: set_column_widths
tools.description: Set explicit widths for one or more worksheet columns

tools.name: autofit_columns
tools.description: Auto-fit worksheet columns based on content width

tools.name: set_row_heights
tools.description: Set explicit heights for one or more worksheet rows

tools.name: merge_cells
tools.description: Merge cells in a range

tools.name: unmerge_cells
tools.description: Unmerge previously merged cells

tools.name: get_merged_cells
tools.description: Get list of merged cell ranges

tools.name: apply_formula
tools.description: Apply Excel formula to cell

tools.name: validate_formula_syntax
tools.description: Validate Excel formula syntax

tools.name: list_charts
tools.description: List embedded charts in a workbook or worksheet

tools.name: create_chart
tools.description: Create chart (line, bar, pie, scatter, or area)

tools.name: create_chart_from_series
tools.description: Create chart from explicit series ranges, including non-contiguous data

tools.name: create_pivot_table
tools.description: Create pivot table from data

tools.name: create_table
tools.description: Create Excel table with styling

tools.name: copy_worksheet
tools.description: Copy worksheet within workbook

tools.name: delete_worksheet
tools.description: Delete worksheet from workbook

tools.name: rename_worksheet
tools.description: Rename a worksheet

tools.name: copy_range
tools.description: Copy cell range to another location

tools.name: delete_range
tools.description: Delete cell range contents

tools.name: validate_excel_range
tools.description: Validate Excel range format

tools.name: get_data_validation_info
tools.description: Get data validation rules for cell

tools.name: insert_rows
tools.description: Insert rows into worksheet

tools.name: insert_columns
tools.description: Insert columns into worksheet

tools.name: delete_sheet_rows
tools.description: Delete rows from worksheet

tools.name: delete_sheet_columns
tools.description: Delete columns from worksheet
